description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist facade. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray color, and the windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows on each visible side. The front features a prominent overhanging awning above the entryway, with a large 'Cafe' sign, suggesting a mixed-use or commercial-residential function. The ground level is bordered by a white picket fence enclosing two green lawn areas, and the entry is centrally located beneath the awning. The roofline is flat, and the upper floor includes several rooms with visible interior partitions and fixtures. The overall design is clean and functional, with an emphasis on geometric simplicity and urban integration.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a prominent awning over the main entry, flanked by fenced green lawns.
description_view_0: Side view showing three windows per floor, the edge of the awning, and a partial view of the fenced lawn.
description_view_1: Rear view with four windows per floor and no awning or entry features visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with three windows per floor and a partial view of the fenced lawn and awning edge.
description_view_3: Front view with a large awning, 'Cafe' sign, central entryway, and two fenced green lawns.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a large flat awning, prominent signage, and fenced green lawns on either side.
